data.hyperedge_name: <hyperedge>"2.3 Beneficiaries must submit: • Certified death certificate • Completed claim form • Government-issued ID"
<hyperedge>"Conversion available: At any time before the policy expires, OR Before the insured's 65th birthday, whichever is earlier."
<hyperedge>"Type: 20-Year Return of Premium Term Life"
<hyperedge>"No war, aviation, travel, or hazardous activity exclusions apply."
<hyperedge>"Policy loans are NOT available under this policy type."
<hyperedge>"If death occurs during the term, beneficiaries receive: Full death benefit ($300,000), PLUS A proportional premium refund based on the early surrender schedule above."
<hyperedge>"Death Benefit: $300,000"
<hyperedge>"Partial withdrawals are NOT permitted."
<hyperedge>"Missed premiums cannot be made up. If a premium is paid late (during grace period), the ROP benefit is reduced by 10% for each late payment."
<hyperedge>"Marco Daniel Martinez (Son) - 50%"
<hyperedge>"The ROP benefit is NOT considered a taxable gain when paid (consult your tax advisor)."
<hyperedge>"Minimum conversion amount: $50,000; Maximum conversion amount: $300,000 (current face amount)."
<hyperedge>"3.1 END OF TERM ROP: If the insured is alive on September 15, 2044, and all premiums have been paid, we"
<hyperedge>"This policy does NOT build cash value that can be borrowed against during the term."
<hyperedge>"Upon reinstatement, the ROP benefit is recalculated to exclude the lapsed period."
<hyperedge>"Name: Nicole Christine Martinez"

<hyperedge>"If the policy lapses, you may apply for reinstatement within 5 years if: • You provide satisfactory evidence of insurability • You pay all past due premiums with interest at 6% per annum • The insured is still alive"
<hyperedge>"Example: If death occurs in Year 8, beneficiaries receive: $300,000 death benefit + (30% × $12,960 premiums paid) = $300,000 + $3,888 = $303,888."
<hyperedge>"Policy Term: 20 years (ending September 15, 2044)"
<hyperedge>"1.1 This is a Return of Premium (ROP) Term Life Insurance Policy."
<hyperedge>"This policy costs more than standard term life insurance because of the return of premium feature."
<hyperedge>"Upon conversion: New policy premium based on attained age; ROP benefit is forfeited; Premiums paid to date are"
<hyperedge>"Date of Birth: April 7, 1988"
<hyperedge>"Annual Premium: $1,620"
<hyperedge>"ROP payments are made within 60 days of the applicable date."
<hyperedge>"If the insured dies by suicide within 24 months of the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid without interest. No death benefit is payable."
<hyperedge>"Changes must be submitted in writing to our home office."
<hyperedge>"1.2 UNIQUE FEATURE: If the insured survives the 20-year term and all premiums have been paid, we will return 100% of all premiums paid ($32,400) to the policy owner."
<hyperedge>"A new 2-year suicide and contestability period begins upon reinstatement."
<hyperedge>"Policy No: VG-ROP-2024-4183"
<hyperedge>"Gender: Female"
<hyperedge>"• ROP benefit is forfeited"
<hyperedge>"• Premiums paid to date are NOT returned"
<hyperedge>"Annual premium of $1,620 is due each September 15."
<hyperedge>"Premium Mode: Annual"
<hyperedge>"For questions or service, contact: ValueGuard Life Insurance Company, Customer Service: 1-800-VALUE-GUARD, Email: service@valueguardlife.com."
<hyperedge>"• New policy premium based on attained age"
<hyperedge>"1.3 This policy combines: • Life insurance protection during the term • Return of all premiums if you outlive the term • Option to convert to permanent insurance"
<hyperedge>"As policy owner, you may: Change beneficiaries at any time, Convert to permanent insurance, Assign the policy as collateral, Surrender the policy for the applicable ROP percentage."
<hyperedge>"Issued: September 15, 2024"
<hyperedge>"Age at Issue: 36"
<hyperedge>"As policy owner, you may: • Change beneficiaries at any time"
<hyperedge>"Maximum conversion amount: $300,000 (current face amount)"
<hyperedge>"Premiums are LEVEL and will not increase during the term."
<hyperedge>"Return of Premium at End of Term: $32,400 (if policy maintained)"
<hyperedge>"2.1 If the insured dies during the policy term while the policy is in force, we will pay $300,000 to the beneficiary."
<hyperedge>"You may convert this policy to a permanent life insurance policy without evidence of insurability."
<hyperedge>"Date: September 15, 2024"
<hyperedge>"President, ValueGuard Life Insurance Company"
<hyperedge>"If the insured is alive on September 15, 2044, and all premiums have been paid, we will pay the policy owner $32,400 (100% of premiums paid over 20 years)."
<hyperedge>"Smoker Status: Non-Smoker"
<hyperedge>"The only way to access cash value is through: • Full surrender (with applicable ROP percentage), OR • Waiting until end of term for full ROP payment"
<hyperedge>"CRITICAL: To receive the full return of premium at end of term, ALL premiums must be paid on time."
<hyperedge>"Primary: Carlos Roberto Martinez (Husband) - 100%"
<hyperedge>"We may contest the policy within 2 years of issue if there was material misrepresentation in the application."
<hyperedge>"If age was misstated, we will adjust the death benefit to what the premium would have purchased at the correct age. ROP amount is not affected."
<hyperedge>"2.2 The death benefit is payable in addition to any proportional premium refund (see Section 3)."
<hyperedge>"Executed at Minneapolis, Minnesota"
<hyperedge>"Rating: Preferred Plus"

<hyperedge>"If you surrender this policy before the end of term: Years 1-5: 0% premium return; Years 6-10: 30% of premiums paid returned; Years 11-15: 60% of premiums paid returned; Years 16-19: 90% of premiums paid returned; Year 20: 100% of premiums paid returned."
<hyperedge>"Contingent: Sofia Isabella Martinez (Daughter) - 50%"
<hyperedge>"Grace period: 31 days. If premium is not paid within grace period, policy lapses and return of premium benefit is forfeited."
